title: Sync stable docs and close the review loop
description: After data and tests pass, update the durable maintainer guidance for the medium-scene-fragment fourth-pool rule and review the root entry files for concise sync. Game content extraction/agents.md is the primary rule source; agents.md, README.md, and .gitignore should only change if the new implementation introduces a stable rule update or a real cache-tracking correction.
acceptance_criteria: 1 primary maintainer rule source is updated first: Game content extraction/agents.md documents the accepted medium-scene-fragment fourth-pool rule in concise stable wording.
3 root files are checked for sync: agents.md, README.md, and .gitignore; only files that need a stable-rule or tracked-cache correction are edited.

1 execution summary records the final verification commands/results at .workflow/active/WFS-blind-box-medium-scene-fragments/.process/EXECUTION_SUMMARY.md and confirms that unrelated workflow artifacts were not modified.
verification: python -B -m py_compile 'Game content extraction\内容抽取.py' 'Game content extraction\data\blind_boxes.py'

produces: Stable maintainer guidance aligned with the implemented fourth-pool model
A clean review checkpoint at .process/EXECUTION_SUMMARY.md for workflow execution closure
ready_for: Session can be closed or handed to workflow-execute once docs are synced and the working tree only shows intended files
